Report.Name: Demand Forecast - PointOfSale
Report.Description: Demand forecast por punto de venta

With.Name: Main
With.Cte: SELECT PointOfSaleDemandForecast.[Week] AS [Week], {{ Fields -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: TotalStock --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedReceptions + PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Receptions + --PointOfSaleDemandForecast.SimulatedReceptions + PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Stock) AS TotalStock -Expression: Stock --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Stock) AS Stock -Expression: AccumulatedReceptions --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedReceptions) AS AccumulatedReceptions -Expression: Receptions --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Receptions) AS Receptions -Expression: Sales --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Sales) AS Sales -Expression: Breakage --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.Breakage) AS Breakage -Expression: Order --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.[Order]) AS [Order] -Expression: PurchaseOrder --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.PurchaseOrder) AS PurchaseOrder -Expression: OrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.OrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) AS OrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: AccumulatedSales --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedSales) AS AccumulatedSales -Expression: AccumulatedOrders --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrders) AS AccumulatedOrders -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) AS AccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: SimulatedReceptions --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.SimulatedReceptions) AS SimulatedReceptions -Expression: PurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.PurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) AS PurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: AccumulatedPurchaseOrder --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedPurchaseOrder) AS AccumulatedPurchaseOrder -Expression: AccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --SUM(PointOfSaleDemandForecast.AccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) AS AccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple }} FROM Fact.PointOfSaleDemandForecast {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Table: PointOfSaleDemandForecast -On:PointOfSaleId-PointOfSaleId }} {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Table: PointOfSaleDemandForecast -On: ProductId-ProductId }} {{ GroupBy -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Sql --PointOfSaleDemandForecast.[Week] }}
With.Query: SELECT [Week], {{ Fields -Dimension: PointsOfSale -Dimension: Products -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: TotalStock --TotalStock -Expression: Stock --Stock -Expression: AccumulatedReceptions --AccumulatedReceptions -Expression: Receptions --Receptions -Expression: Sales --Sales -Expression: Breakage --Breakage -Expression: Order --[Order] -Expression: PurchaseOrder --PurchaseOrder -Expression: OrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --OrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: AccumulatedSales --AccumulatedSales -Expression: AccumulatedOrders --AccumulatedOrders -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --AccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: SimulatedReceptions --SimulatedReceptions -Expression: PurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --PurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: AccumulatedPurchaseOrder --AccumulatedPurchaseOrder -Expression: AccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --AccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple -WhenRequestTotals --Default ---COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount --Expression: TotalStock ---SUM(TotalStock) OVER() AS TotalTotalStock --Expression: Stock ---SUM(Stock) OVER() AS TotalStocks --Expression: AccumulatedReceptions ---SUM(AccumulatedReceptions) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedReceptions --Expression: Receptions ---SUM(Receptions) OVER() AS TotalReceptions --Expression: Sales ---SUM(Sales) OVER() AS TotalSales --Expression: Breakage ---SUM(Breakage) OVER() AS TotalBreakage --Expression: Order ---SUM([Order]) OVER() AS TotalOrder --Expression: PurchaseOrder ---SUM(PurchaseOrder) OVER() AS TotalPurchaseOrder --Expression: OrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple ---SUM(OrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) OVER() AS TotalOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --Expression: AccumulatedSales ---SUM(AccumulatedSales) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedSales --Expression: AccumulatedOrders ---SUM(AccumulatedOrders) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedOrders --Expression: AccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple ---SUM(AccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedOrdersMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --Expression: SimulatedReceptions ---SUM(SimulatedReceptions) OVER() AS TotalSimulatedReceptions --Expression: PurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple ---SUM(PurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) OVER() AS TotalPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple --Expression: AccumulatedPurchaseOrder ---SUM(AccumulatedPurchaseOrder) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedPurchaseOrder --Expression: AccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple ---SUM(AccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedPurchaseOrderMatchedToMinimunAndMultiple }} FROM GroupedCte {{ OrderBy -Dimension: PointsOfSale -Dimension: Products -Sql: --[Week] }} {{Pagination}}
